name: Crunchy Peanut Chocolate Squares
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Preheat oven to 325°F. Process cookies until finely ground crumbs in a food processor. Add melted butter and mix together. Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch square baking pan. Bake for 10 minutes and cool to room temperature.
Chocolate layers: Melt chocolate in a double boiler. Pour half of the melted chocolate over the cooled crust and spread evenly. Chill and keep remaining chocolate warm over a double boiler.
Peanut butter filling: Blend peanut butter and butter together until smooth using an electric mixer. Slowly beat in powdered sugar, vanilla, and continue beating until smooth. Spread the peanut butter filling over the chilled chocolate layer. Pour the remaining warm chocolate over the filling and spread smooth. Chill for 1 hour or until firm, then cut into bars or squares.
